sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74750" key="o)rganoqesi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀργᾰνο-θεσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄργανον</foreign> IV) <sense id="n74750.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drawing up of tables,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κανονικαὶ -θεσίαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:150:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">150.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
